title: YouGarden Acer palmatum 'Orange Dream' in 10.5cm Pot, Japanese Maple Trees for UK Gardens, Perfect in Large Pots or in The Ground, Ready to Plant Out
features: STRIKING ACER PALMATUM TREE A striking Acer that boasts an ever-changing spectacle of colour throughout the year with orange leaves tipped in pink
FULLY HARDY Fully hardy even in the coldest winters, Orange Dream will explode with incredible colour in spring with bright orange new growth

JAPANESE MAPLE The stunning, ever-changing foliage of this Japanese maple changes colour throughout the year. From bright orange in the spring through to greenish hues in summer and orange-yellow in autumn
SPECIMEN TREE A great specimen shrub this Japanese Maple is slow growing and easy to maintain, ideal for small gardens or in a large plant pot. Deserving of its RHS Award of Garden Merit
DETAILS Supplied as an established plant in a 10.5cm, ready to plant
